description_long: This is a dark-colored baseball cap featuring a structured, rounded crown and a flat, wide brim. The front and side panels are adorned with repeated text in a subtle, slightly lighter shade, including the words 'Volkswagen', 'Nutzf', 'Commercial', and 'Vecoli'. On the left side, there is a small, circular metallic or embroidered Volkswagen logo. The back of the cap is plain, with visible stitching and no additional decoration. The overall appearance is modern and branded, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A dark, branded baseball cap with a flat brim, repeated Volkswagen-themed text, and a small logo on the side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cap's structured crown and the repeated Volkswagen-themed text across the front panels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the small circular Volkswagen logo and the continuation of the text pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain back of the cap with visible stitching and no text or logos.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the text pattern wrapping around the side, with no visible logo.
